# Banks pending re-harvest — transitional allow-list
#
# Banks listed here have a known harvester recipe gap that prevents
# the captured static HTML from containing the credential input(s)
# needed to drive Mode A + Mode B integration tests.
#
# The coverage gate (CheckBankIntegrationCoverage.ts) downgrades these
# banks from FAIL → tracked as pending operator work. Tests for these
# banks skip with a comment pointing to this file.
#
# Operator workflow:
#   1. Run `npx tsx src/Tests/Integration/Tools/HarvestBankHtml.ts <bankId>`
#   2. Verify the loginStep HTML contains <input type="password"> or
#      <input id="password|tzPassword|otpLoginPwd">
#   3. Commit the new fixtures
#   4. Remove the bankId from this allow-list
#   5. Re-run pre-commit — the bank should now DRIVE green in both modes
#
# Format: one bankId per line. Lines starting with `#` are comments.
#
# ── Currently pending (4) ──
#
# Massad      recipe gap: login form has a tab/accordion-toggle UI
#             that reveals the password tab only after click. Harvester
#             needs `click-password-tab` step before capture.
massad
#
# Pagi        recipe gap: same as Massad — click-password-tab step needed.
pagi
#
# OtsarHahayal recipe gap: same as Massad — click-password-tab step needed.
otsarHahayal
#
# Yahav       recipe gap: BaNCS Digital Angular SPA (#/authentication)
#             behind SiteMinder + Imperva Incapsula — the credential form
#             is rendered post-JS, so static capture lacks the num /
#             nationalID / password inputs. Harvester needs SPA-hydration-
#             aware capture before the loginStep HTML will contain them.
#             Pipeline is registered + WellKnown-resolvable; requiresHydration
#             stays true until a full HarvestBankHtml.ts run.
yahav
#
# ── Resolved (kept for traceability) ──
# visaCal     RESOLVED in PR #335 C7: harvester gained frame-aware reveal
#             (clickRevealAnyFrame) + 3-step recipe (01-home + 02-pre-login
#             + 03-username-tab clicks "כניסה עם שם משתמש" tab); MirrorInterceptor
#             gained iframe routing (loadFrameRoutes serves per-frame HTML from
#             frames.json). Password form lives inside the
#             connect.cal-online.co.il/regular-login iframe.
#
# Amex        RESOLVED in PR #335 C9: loginStep points at the harvested
#             top-document file (03-after-flip/main.html) — credential
#             form <form id="otpLobbyFormPassword"> lives there. The
#             sibling 8 captured iframes describe analytics (reCAPTCHA,
#             DoubleClick) and have no credentials, so we let
#             MirrorInterceptor abort them at the network layer instead
#             of replaying them (replaying made the resolver waste
#             discovery time probing third-party frames; see PR #335 C9).
#             C8's MirrorFrameRoutes infra stays in place as opt-in for
#             future banks whose credential form actually lives in a
#             multi-iframe cascade (none today).
